entities.summary: Global inference context storing shared state across layers

detail.name: Context
detail.description: Singleton-like context holding block tables, positions, and other per-step state needed by all layers.
detail.why: Layers need shared state (positions, block tables) without threading it through every function signature

teaches.explain: Bundle related state into one object passed through the call stack. Avoids threading 10+ parameters through every function.
Each thread gets its own copy of the variable. Enables per-request state in concurrent servers without locks.

detail.name: get_context
detail.description: Returns the active Context object for this inference step.

teaches.explain: Module-level function returning shared state. Simpler than dependency injection for deeply nested access patterns.

entities.summary: Set the inference context for current step

detail.name: set_context
detail.description: Called at step start to establish context. All layers read from this during forward pass.

teaches.explain: Set at boundary (step start), read during processing, reset at end. Clear ownership prevents stale state bugs.

detail.name: reset_context
detail.description: Ensures no stale state leaks between inference steps.

teaches.explain: Always reset shared state after use. Prevents one requests state from leaking into the next. Defense against subtle bugs.
